# localino_builder example

Runnable demo of the typed key generator. Drives the parser + generator over
in-memory locale maps and prints the generated `LocalinoKeys` source — no API
token, no network, no Flutter.

```
dart run example/example.dart
```

## Output

```dart
// GENERATED by localino_builder — do not edit by hand.
// ignore_for_file: constant_identifier_names, lines_longer_than_80_chars

abstract final class LocalinoKeys {
  /// Add
  static const action_add = 'action_add';

  /// Delete locale
  /// ⚠ missing in: cs_CZ
  static const action_delete_locale = 'action_delete_locale';

  /// (list)
  static const menu_tabs = 'menu_tabs';

  /// (map)
  static const onboard_card_1 = 'onboard_card_1';

  /// Version: {version} ({number})
  /// params: version, number
  static const version = 'version';
}
```

## In a real project

The builder fetches locale maps from the Localino API and writes this source to
`lib/generated/localino_keys.dart` when `generate_keys: true` is set:

```yaml
targets:
  $default:
    builders:
      localino_builder:
        options:
          space: 'your space id'
          project: 'your project id'
          access: 'your access token'
          generate_keys: true
```

```
dart run localino_builder --generate-keys
```

Call sites then swap magic strings for typed constants:

```dart
title: Localize.i(LocalinoKeys.action_add),
```

See the package [README](../README.md) for full details.
